reviews.review_description: There are lots of slots to play. They are situated on a large screen.  You are the only person there.  If you like playing alone it’s great. Would be nice if you could walk around and pick a machine but there is only a large screen with multiple games so it’s like playing on your television.  I still like it and visit daily to get free coins to play with.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the kindness review. We strive to improve our user experience. Stay tuned to our upcoming releases with new UI and more games!

reviews.review_description: I was so happy that there was a new slot game, however, you have to hold to center everytime you go in. The slot games are on 'a big screen tv' on the wall. There are many slot games to choose from. The games are ok, payouts pitiful. Most take your tokens before a bonus hits. Daily spin usually gives $200,000 to 400,000, so you can play for free for a little bit. At $6,000 to 12,000 per bet it is gone quickly. It's ok, but not as immersive as other slot games.

reviews.review_title: Nice spin (ha) on some pretty cool slot
reviews.review_description: Lots of slot machines, bonuses and done pretty wild side games... Really like the progression aspect and the leveling up rewards... Gameplay is really smooth, no Hicks and once you get used to menus pretty nice maneuvering around... Even in a limited multilayer room would be awesome.. Either way lots of fun, great job,,, can't wait to see where this progresses to... .

developer_response.body:
Dear Kriquet,

Thanks for your kind words! We definitely will release more and more fun slots and events into the game! Please stay tuned. Please do not hesitate to provide any feedbacks and comments to help@playbonkers.com.

Your Jackpot VR Team
